'''''Hospital''''' was an [[XQ2 Platform]] located in deep space, a short [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump from [[Brint-wo Colony]].

==History==
In the aftermath of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], many injured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] were taken to this station for treatment and rehabilitation under Commander [[Beckman]]; they were watched over by the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] [[Shadow (MC40a light cruiser)|''Shadow'']]. Their respite was short-lived, however, as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Corrupter Task Force|task force]], led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]] commanding the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']], dropped out of hyperspace and began a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bomber]] [[Battle of Hospital|assault]] of ''Hospital''.

[[File:Rebel_Hospital_ISDII.jpg|left|thumb|The [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] approaches ''Hospital''.]]

During the fighting, both [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Emon Azzameen]] distinguished themselves by destroying many TIEs. Thanks primarily to their efforts, at least 66% of the Rebel personnel escaped. Despite their bravery, they were unable to save the ''[[Vasudra]]'', a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] supply ship crewed by their father and brother. Both [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas]] and [[Galin Azzameen/Legends|Galin Azzameen]] were lost, and presumed killed in the battle.

''Hospital'' itself was evacuated by the Rebels, and then seized by the Imperials.

==Behind the scenes==
The exact location of the ''Hospital'' is not specified in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''.

Although many of the allotment of Rebel ships parked at the base carry wounded from the Battle of Hoth, it is uncertain if these ships, particularly the two GR-75 Medium Transports, were present at the engagement.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
